description: Observable Agent calls with prompts and local identifiers omitted when no call occurred.

opus-v1.3.1-candidate-1-mechanical.prompt:
Repo: <fixture-root> (work in this checkout; do not create worktrees).

GOAL
Update normalize(record) in each of the 12 modules in src/adapters/ so it returns a new object that preserves all record fields, trims record.label, maps enabled to true only for boolean true or string true, and never mutates the input.

SCOPE AND OWNERSHIP
The worker exclusively owns src/adapters/{alpha,bravo,charlie,delta,echo,foxtrot,golf,hotel,india,juliet,kilo,lima}.js. No other file may change.

CONSTRAINTS
Keep every module self-contained, add no helper or import, preserve the named export, do not edit tests/package/CLAUDE.md, apply the supplied identical target body, and report any unexpected starting content instead of improvising.

DONE
All 12 files contain the target body, git status lists only those files, npm test passes, and the worker reports changed files and evidence.

opus-v1.3.1-release-payload-mechanical.prompt:
Repo: <fixture-root>.

GOAL
Update normalize(record) in each of the 12 modules in src/adapters/ so it returns a new object that preserves all fields, trims record.label, and maps enabled to true only for boolean true or string true.

SCOPE AND OWNERSHIP
The worker exclusively owns src/adapters/{alpha,bravo,charlie,delta,echo,foxtrot,golf,hotel,india,juliet,kilo,lima}.js. No other file may change.

CONSTRAINTS
Keep each module self-contained, add no helper or import, preserve the named export, do not edit tests, do not mutate record, and use the supplied identical target body.

DONE
All 12 files contain the target body and npm test passes. Report pass/fail counts and the changed-file count.
